311.31. 1112(3), Era-e1 6 3313‘, 2007; 3131. 212(3), 1111151 30 3-1311, 2008; 31.31. 1700(3), 11113151 16 3315‘, 2009, 311 3131397(3),a1fi3411513&,2m9,mi@§‘1§ 1 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [min—Sac. 3(a)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd July, 2009 8.0. 1812(E).— Whereas the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources vide its notification number 8.0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, I 986, constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of certain matters referred therein, and the said Tribunal forwarded its report to the Central Government on 30th January, I987; And whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said Tribunal on 19th August, 1987 requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid; And whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Central Government extended the period ofmaking the said report, fi'om time to time, till the 5th August, 2009; And whereas, the Central Government, keeping in view the exigencies of the work involved, as pointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for another six months after the 5th August, 2009; Now therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the Inter— StaterRiver Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Govemment hereby further extends the period, within which the Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day ofFebruary, 2010, and for that purpose makes the . following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources number 8.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, namely:— In the said notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters “till the 5th day of August, 2009”, the words, figues and letters “till the 5th day of February, 2010” shall be substituted. [F.No. 15/3/85-I.T.] UMESH NARAYAN PANJIAR, Secy. Note:— The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal was published in the Gazette of India vide number 5.0. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, 1986 and subsequently amended vide number 8.0. 666(E), datedthe lOthJune, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its further report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 8.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003; 8.0. 889(E), dated the 5th August, 2004; 5.0. 16603), dated the 4th February, 2005; 5.0. 1093(E), dated the 4th August, 2005; 8.0. 13303), dated the 3rd February, 2006; so. 1218(E),datedthe 28th July, 2006; 3.0. 10402), dated the 2nd February, 2007; 8.0. 1112(E), dated the 6th July, 2007; 8.0. 212(E), dated the 30th January, 2008; 8.0. 170003), dated the 16th July, 2008 and 8.0. 397(E), dated the 4th February, 2009. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
